title: gilia pinnatifida var. calcarea
intro: Gilia pinnatifida var. calcarea, also known as Calcary Gilia, is a plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to promote respiratory health, acting as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps in relieving coughs, colds, and bronchitis. The health benefits of Gilia pinnatifida var. calcarea include its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection, its ability to reduce fever, and its potential to soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
